zh.lifeSummary: Irene Mattoon於1690年出生在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓。她於大約1725年與Moses Hutchinson在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1752年7月22日在美國康乃狄克州托藍德賀布隆享年62歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州托藍德賀布隆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Irene Mattoon于1690年出生在美国马萨诸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓。她于大约1725年与Moses Hutchinson在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1752年7月22日在美国康涅狄格州托藍德賀布隆享年62岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州托藍德賀布隆。

nameMeanings.name: Mattoon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably an altered form of French   Maton   or   Matton  , or perhaps   Mouton  .

History: This surname was reportedly brought to North America via England by Hubartus (originally Huybrecht or Huijbrecht) Mattoon, probably born in the Netherlands, who is recorded in 1648/49 in Portsmouth, NH. He is regarded by some to be of French Huguenot stock, and in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors a rare variant Matoon of the surname Mattoon is mentioned in connection with another French Huguenot (see Mouton ).

variants.name: Maton
meanings: English (Wiltshire and Hampshire): from the Middle English personal name Maton (a pet form of Mat, a diminutive of Matthew ; see Matt ), with the diminutive suffix -on.
French (mainly Nord): from a pet form of the personal name   Mathieu   (see   Matthew  ). Compare   Matton  .

nameMeanings.name: Irene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Greek eirēnē ‘peace’ it was borne in Greek mythology by a minor goddess who personified peace, and by a Byzantine empress ( 752–803 ). The name was taken up in the English-speaking world at the end of the 19th century, and became popular in the 20th, partly as a result of being used as the name of a character in John Galsworthy's The Forsyte Saga ( 1922 ). It was formerly pronounced in three syllables, as in Greek, but is now thoroughly naturalized as an English name and usually pronounced as two syllables.

en.lifeSummary: Irene Mattoon was born in 1690, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, United States. She married Moses Hutchinson about 1725, in Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 22 July 1752, in Hebron, Tolland, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 62, and was buried in Hebron, Tolland, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Irene Mattoon est née en 1690, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Elle a épousé Moses Hutchinson environ 1725, à Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 juillet 1752, à Hebron, Tolland, Connecticut, États-Unis, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Hebron, Tolland, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Irene Mattoon wurde 1690 in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten geboren. Sie hat um 1725 in Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten Moses Hutchinson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Juli 1752 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Hebron, Tolland, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Hebron, Tolland, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Irene Mattoon è nata il nel 1690 nel Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Lei sposato Moses Hutchinson circa 1725, nel Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 22 luglio 1752, nel Hebron, Tolland, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Hebron, Tolland, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Irene Mattoonは1690年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンで生まれた。約1725年にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ロンドンレバノンでMoses Hutchinsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1752年7月22日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州トランドヘブロンで62歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州トランドヘブロンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Irene Mattoon(은)는 1690년 미국 매사추세츠 주 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1725년 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 레바넌에서 Moses Hutchinson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1752년 7월 22일 미국 코네티컷 주 톨랜드 브런에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 톨랜드 브런에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Irene Mattoon nasceu em 1690, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Ela casou-se com Moses Hutchinson aproximadamente 1725, em Lebanon, New London, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de julho de 1752, em Hebron, Tolland, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Hebron, Tolland, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Irene Mattoon родилась в 1690 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Moses Hutchinson около 1725 г. в местности лебанон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 22 июля 1752 г. в местности хеброн, толланд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности хеброн, толланд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Irene Mattoon nació en 1690, en Northampton, Hampshire, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Se casó con Moses Hutchinson aproximadamente 1725, en Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 22 de julio de 1752, en Hebron, Tolland, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Hebron, Tolland, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
